configurations.name: static
runtimeArgs: import http.server, functools; http.server.ThreadingHTTPServer(('', 8932), type('H', (http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler,), {'end_headers': lambda s: (s.send_header('Cache-Control', 'no-store'), http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler.end_headers(s))[1]})).serve_forever()
